resources.string: Zodl\'s currency conversion feature doesn\'t compromise your IP address.
Exchange rates are fetched over Tor to protect your IP address. Ensure Tor use is allowed in your region.
The rate is refreshed automatically and can also be refreshed manually.
We tried but we couldn\’t refresh the exchange rate for you. Check your connection, relaunch the app, and we\’ll try again.
Live rates for %1$s can\'t be fetched right now. You can use USD as a fallback, or keep entering amounts in ZEC only.
Note for the super privacy-conscious: Because we pull the conversion rate from exchanges, an exchange might be able to see that the exchange rate was queried before a transaction occurred.
Display your balance and payment amounts in selected currency. For Swap and Pay, exchange rates will continue to be shown in USD. You can manage this feature in Advanced Settings.
Display your balance and payment amounts in selected currency.

Tor Protection is a beta feature that provides additional protections for your IP address. USD exchange rates are only available when it is enabled.\n\nIf Tor is permitted in your region, we recommend enabling it. You can manage it in Advanced Settings.
Disabling Tor Protection will also disable the Currency Conversion feature until re-enabled.
If you would like to protect your IP address, enable Tor Protection in Advanced Settings.
